name: Crockpot Round Steak Italiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 5 or 6 serving-size pieces.
2. Coat each piece with salt, oregano, and pepper.
3. Place the seasoned steak in the crock-pot.
4. Pour spaghetti sauce over the meat.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours, or until the meat is tender.
6. Turn the control to high heat.
7. Add the onions and cook for 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Serve with Italian green beans and toasted garlic cheese bread. Makes 5 to 6 servings...
